data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Updated reviewer-delta-light.md with: file-type detection section (bash/.sh, Python/.py, markdown), bash-specific sub-criteria (variable quoting in conditionals, set -euo pipefail, command output validation), Python-specific sub-criteria (os.system→subprocess, bare except, subprocess shell injection), Linter Suppression Rules section (ruff, shellcheck, mypy). Rebuilt generated agent via build-review-agents.sh.
